title: Canary Bun version in CI makes builds non-reproducible
reasoning: Using bun-version: canary means every CI run may use a different Bun build. A canary release could introduce breaking changes or bugs that silently break typecheck, install, or runtime behavior without any code change, making failures hard to diagnose and blocking deploys unpredictably.
reproduction: Wait for a new canary Bun release that changes behavior; the next CI run may fail or produce different results despite no code change.
recommendation: Pin to a stable major version (e.g., bun-version: latest or a specific version like 1.x) for reproducible CI. Reserve canary for a separate experimental workflow.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests cover the CI environment configuration itself.
minimumFixScope: Change bun-version from 'canary' to 'latest' or a pinned stable version.
